learningObjectives.title: Understand product master data
learningObjectives.description: Explain how product attributes influence package building, planning and optimization.

learningObjectives.title: Understand product hierarchy
learningObjectives.description: Describe category-to-item hierarchy and its role in transportation planning.

learningObjectives.title: Differentiate material and product master use
learningObjectives.description: Clarify ERP material information versus TM planning-specific product usage.

sections.title: Product Master Data in SAP TM

sections.content: Product Master Data defines the characteristics of materials transported through SAP TM. It contains information such as weight, volume, dimensions, dangerous goods classification and transportation requirements. SAP TM uses this information for package building, capacity planning, optimization and freight execution.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: SAP TM does not transport sales orders-it transports products. Product master data directly influences planning and optimization decisions.

A company transports refrigerators weighing 95 kg each. SAP TM reads the product's weight and dimensions from Product Master Data, calculates truck capacity, determines pallet requirements and creates an optimized Freight Order.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Maintain accurate product dimensions, weight and volume. Incorrect product master data directly affects freight planning and vehicle utilization.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: An appliance manufacturer corrected incorrect product dimensions in SAP TM. Vehicle loading accuracy improved by 27%, reducing overloaded shipments and unnecessary truck usage.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Certification questions often ask which master data provides weight, volume and dimensions for transportation planning. The correct answer is Product Master Data.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Do not confuse Product Master Data with Package Building Profiles. Product Master defines product characteristics, while Package Building defines how products are packed.

items: Product Master stores transportation-related product information.
Weight, volume and dimensions influence planning.
Product data is used in package building and capacity planning.
Accurate product data improves transportation optimization.
Product Master is a critical master data object in SAP TM.
